description: Implement an automated data retention policy for the 'demodb' database. Create a class named 'UserSessions' with properties 'Token' (String), 'Created' (DateTime), and 'UserEmail' (String). Populate the class with test data consisting of 5 active sessions (created within the last hour) and 5 expired sessions (created 48 hours ago) using real emails from the Profiles class. Create a server-side function named 'cleanup_sessions' that deletes UserSessions records older than 24 hours and configure the OrientDB Scheduler to run this function every hour. Verify the policy by executing the function to ensure expired records are removed while active ones remain.
